title: Olympia Bead Dessert Knife St/St (Box 12) Bead Table Fork St/St (Box 12)
features: High-polish finish adds a premium look, 18/0 steel is also magnetic, which is ideal for use with magnetic cutlery saving systems
Supplied in a pack of 12 to stock-up your cutlery selection, 18/0 stainless steel provides long-lasting cutlery
Easy to clean and dry after use for a fast turnaround of fresh cutlery
description: From the manufacturer Olympia 9400 C127 Bead Dessert Knife (Pack of 12) The instantly recognisable Bead design is widely used around the world and will complement any table setting in any bar, hotel, restaurant or café that prides themselves on traditional, homemade food. This dessert knife is slightly smaller than a table knife and is perfect for use with cake or served with afternoon tea. Recommended Uses For Product Home Needs Brand Olympia Special Feature Rust Resistant Age Range Description Adult Target Gender Unisex Olympia Bead Table Fork 199mm 18/0 Stainless Steel Cutlery Kitchen 12pc Transform your dining experience and impress your guests with the Olympia Bead Table Forks (Pack of 12), 200(L)mm. These forks are not just any ordinary cutlery, but a classic and stylish addition to elevate any table setting at your home. Crafted with premium 18/0 stainless steel, these forks are built to last long while retaining its elegance throughout the years. The high-polish finish adds an exquisite touch, making it a sight to behold that will make every meal feel like a special occasion. But wait. There's more. These forks feature a unique beaded border on the handle - adding personality and charm to each piece. Ideal for use with other Bead cutlery, these forks would fit perfectly to create a beautiful dining experience. Not only do these forks look great and feel comfortable in your hand, but they are also practical. The magnetic qualities make them perfect for use with magnetic cutlery saving systems so you can keep everything together and organized. The Olympia Bead Table Forks come in packs of 12 so you can revamp your entire cutlery selection at once. And since they are easy to clean after use, you can enjoy quick turnaround times between uses. Indulge in style and durability with these remarkable table forks today. Material Stainless Steel Color Silver Brand Olympia Number Of Pieces 1 Finish Type Polished
